## What does this PR add or change?

<!-- Briefly describe the recipe or skill you are contributing or the fix you are making -->

## Checklist

### For recipe contributions
- [ ] Used the [recipe skill template](templates/RECIPE-SKILL-TEMPLATE.md)
- [ ] Dish has been added to [skills/recipes/README.md](skills/recipes/README.md)
- [ ] Recipe has been personally cooked and eaten by the contributor
- [ ] Includes a **Taste like a chef** section
- [ ] Includes food safety note if raw meat, seafood, eggs, or reheating is involved
- [ ] All measurements are clear (metric for precision, household measures for flexibility)
- [ ] Folder name is lowercase and hyphenated

### For skill contributions
- [ ] Follows the skill format in existing skills (frontmatter + structured sections)
- [ ] Added to the relevant bucket README and top-level README.md

### For fixes
- [ ] Fix is clearly described in the PR description
